scientific_interpretation.dominant_regime: semantic competence with procedural/canonical commitment avoidance
scientific_interpretation.uncertainty_expression_mode: implicit compression/substitution (short scalar/direct outputs), not explicit refusal text
read_file_weakness_hypothesis: prompt archetypes reward direct semantic closure (symbol/function/boolean answers)
model chooses completion of requested result instead of execution step
i9 semantic conversion coverage was skewed toward rg_search (50 rows) vs read_file (14 rows)
no observed read_file exact-valid foothold to reinforce canonical commitment behavior

explicit_conclusions.1_dominant_residual_bottleneck: Semantic/scalar substitution rebound (procedural commitment bypass) with read_file-specific collapse of canonical commitment.
explicit_conclusions.2_primary_nature_of_scalar_substitution: Primarily procedural avoidance with serialization aversion under uncertainty; less evidence for latent semantic ambiguity as primary driver.
explicit_conclusions.3_why_read_file_uniquely_weak: All read_file failures are payload_not_parsed direct/substitution outputs across three archetypes; conversion coverage and canonical footholds were insufficient compared with rg_search.
explicit_conclusions.4_semantic_conversion_vs_wrapper_repair_: Yes. Expected marginal return is higher for semantic-substitution conversion than additional wrapper repair.
explicit_conclusions.5_most_promising_i10_family: Localized read_file-first semantic-substitution conversion with rg_search scalar conversion as secondary.
explicit_conclusions.6_most_dangerous_i10_family: Global coercive schema-policing / negation-heavy blacklist-style interventions (i4/i5-like risk).
explicit_conclusions.7_early_i10_collapse_signature: Rising scalar/direct substitution share despite exact-valid stagnation, narrowing paraphrastic success, style/skeleton monoculture drift, and any no-call/wrapper invariant regression.
explicit_conclusions.8_should_i10_exist: Bounded continuation (not redesign, not halt) is justified if scoped narrowly to semantic-substitution conversion and collapse-watch constraints remain strict.
